description: English SQL-domain battery (7 points, executed on in-memory sqlite). NULL sort order, top-N ties, case-sensitive matching, JOIN dropping unmatched rows, empty-set aggregates, duplicate output, and default sort direction. Same tables/classification as sql_ja; only the prompt language differs.

probes.q: Table items(name TEXT, price INTEGER). Write a SQLite query that returns only the names, ordered from cheapest to most expensive. Output SQL only.
setup: CREATE TABLE items(name TEXT, price INTEGER)

probes.q: Table scores(name TEXT, score INTEGER). Write a SQLite query that returns the names of the top 2 scores. Output SQL only.
setup: CREATE TABLE scores(name TEXT, score INTEGER)

probes.q: Table users(name TEXT). Write a SQLite query that returns the number of rows whose name is alice. Output SQL only.
Tables emp(name TEXT, dept_id INTEGER) and dept(id INTEGER, dname TEXT). Write a SQLite query that lists employee names with their department names. Output SQL only.
setup: CREATE TABLE emp(name TEXT, dept_id INTEGER)
CREATE TABLE dept(id INTEGER, dname TEXT)

probes.q: Table prods(name TEXT, price INTEGER, stock INTEGER). Write a SQLite query that returns the highest price among products with stock of 1 or more. Output SQL only.
setup: CREATE TABLE prods(name TEXT, price INTEGER, stock INTEGER)

probes.q: Table purchases(buyer TEXT, item TEXT). Write a SQLite query that returns the list of buyer names. Output SQL only.
setup: CREATE TABLE purchases(buyer TEXT, item TEXT)

probes.q: Table t(name TEXT). Write a SQLite query that returns the names sorted. Output SQL only.
